prompt: What is the average scholarship amount per student in each department?

inputData.question: What is the average scholarship amount per student in each department?

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average scholarship amount per student in each department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average scholarship amount per student in each department?"},"startedAt":1771804133117,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Compute each student's total scholarship (sum of scholarships.amount), include students with no scholarships as zero, then average those per department. Uses departments -> students left join to count all students deterministically ordered by department name.","sql":"WITH scholarship_totals AS (
  SELECT student_id, SUM(amount) AS total_scholarship
  FROM public.scholarships
  GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT
  d.id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(stt.total_scholarship, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_scholarship_amount,
  COUNT(st.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students st ON st.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN scholarship_totals stt ON stt.student_id = st.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;","assumptions":["Average is defined as the average total scholarship per student (sum of all a student's scholarships) within each department.","Students with no scholarships are counted with scholarship amount = 0.","Department identification uses departments.id and departments.name as returned by the schema discovery."]},"endedAt":1771804162466},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH scholarship_totals AS (

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Scholarship Amount per Student by Department

resultRaw.sql:
WITH scholarship_totals AS (
  SELECT student_id, SUM(amount) AS total_scholarship
  FROM public.scholarships
  GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT
  d.id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(stt.total_scholarship, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_scholarship_amount,
  COUNT(st.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students st ON st.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN scholarship_totals stt ON stt.student_id = st.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Scholarship Amount per Student by Department

result.sql:
WITH scholarship_totals AS (
  SELECT student_id, SUM(amount) AS total_scholarship
  FROM public.scholarships
  GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT
  d.id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(stt.total_scholarship, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_scholarship_amount,
  COUNT(st.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students st ON st.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN scholarship_totals stt ON stt.student_id = st.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
